title: Romantic Springy British Jerusalem Artichokes Full English Pie
description: A paleo-friendly, en-croute Full English dish featuring Jerusalem artichokes, perfect for a romantic spring morning. This recipe combines the earthy flavor of Jerusalem artichokes with traditional British ingredients.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, cook the diced bacon over medium heat until crispy.
Add the diced sausage to the skillet and cook until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the chopped wild garlic and spring onions to the skillet and cook until fragrant.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked sausage mixture, diced Jerusalem artichokes, and beaten eggs.
Roll out the puff pastry on a floured surface to a large rectangle.
Spoon the sausage and artichoke mixture onto one half of the pastry, leaving a 1/2 inch border around the edges.
Brush the edges of the pastry with the melted coconut oil and fold the other half of the pastry over the filling.
Press the edges of the pastry to seal the pie and cut a few slits in the top to allow steam to escape.
Place the pie on a baking sheet and bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
